name: JetBrains Junie

form_factor.comment: JetBrains IDE agent with Junie CLI documentation. Per-form-factor links: IDE: https://www.jetbrains.com/help/ai-assistant/junie-agent.html; CLI: https://www.jetbrains.com/help/ai-assistant/junie-cli.html.

released_in.comment: Introduced by JetBrains as a coding agent in early 2025.

latest_major_update.comment: Current product page emphasizes debugger-backed agent behavior.

rules.comment: JetBrains documents project guidance for Junie, but not AGENTS.md-compatible rules. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

skills.comment: No reusable skill folder standard found. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

mcp_servers.comment: No Junie-specific MCP configuration found in public docs reviewed. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

custom_commands.comment: No custom slash-command system found. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

model_selection.comment: Enterprise docs mention JetBrains AI service plus selected OpenAI/Bedrock models.

approval_mode.comment: Product page lists autonomous, user-assisted, and semi-auto modes.

sandbox_mode.comment: Runs inside JetBrains IDE context; no explicit standalone sandbox controls found.

resume.comment: IDE tasks have progress/history, but explicit session resume docs are limited.

continue.comment: Interactive IDE task continuation is available; no CLI continue command confirmed.

non_interactive.comment: CLI exists, but no verified headless automation flag in docs reviewed.

statusline.comment: IDE UI, no custom CLI statusline found.

telemetry.comment: No Junie-specific telemetry toggle found in docs reviewed.

hosted_agent.comment: Primarily an IDE agent rather than a managed cloud worker.

custom_model_provider.comment: Enterprise service supports selected provider/model options, not arbitrary endpoints.

pricing.value: Bundled with JetBrains AI tiers/free credits
pricing.comment: Junie is included in JetBrains AI subscription/free-tier credit model.

notes: Strong fit for JetBrains users, especially debugger-aware workflows. Public docs expose less extensibility detail than CLI-first agents.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage was not found in public docs reviewed.
